# SuccessCode

> Zi Wei Dou Shu (Purple Star Astrology) consultations and a free online destiny-map calculator. Structural answers to key life questions — career, money, relationships, health, and the timing of decisions — calculated from the exact date, time, and place of birth. Available in English and Russian.

## Main pages

- [Home (English)](https://successcode.net/): What Zi Wei Dou Shu is and the specific life questions a destiny map answers.
- [Home (Russian)](https://successcode.net/ru/): О методе Цзы Вэй Доу Шу и вопросах, на которые отвечает карта судьбы.
- [Book a consultation](https://successcode.net/#booking): Request a personal Zi Wei Dou Shu consultation (EN/RU).

## Free calculators

- [All calculators](https://successcode.net/calculators): Hub of free Chinese-metaphysics calculators.
- [Zi Wei Dou Shu calculator](https://successcode.net/zwds): Build your twelve-palace destiny map from birth date, time, and place.
- [BaZi (Four Pillars) calculator](https://successcode.net/bazi): Four Pillars of Destiny chart.
- [Chinese calendar](https://successcode.net/calendar): Chinese solar/lunar calendar with per-day quality.
- [Success dates calendar](https://successcode.net/successdates): Date selection based on the personal Useful God.
- [Qi Men Dun Jia calculator](https://successcode.net/qmdj): Qi Men Dun Jia chart.

## What a consultation covers

- Career: where your potential lies and when to change roles.
- Money: peak income years and income channels.
- Relationships: partnership and marriage timing.
- Health: tendencies written into the chart.
- Also: property and relocation, children, life purpose, legal matters, and the timing of launching or scaling a venture.

## About the method

- Zi Wei Dou Shu is an ancient Chinese destiny-map system that maps a life across twelve palaces from the exact date, time, and place of birth. It gives a structural answer to a specific question rather than a generic horoscope.

- [Privacy policy](https://successcode.net/ru/privacy.html)
- [Terms of consultation](https://successcode.net/ru/terms.html)
